name: Emmett's
teaser: The only place I would order Chicago Deep Dish in the state of New York.
review: This is the only place I would order Chicago Deep Dish or Tavern Style in the state of New York. It's really good. The counter: If I am looking for top shelf Chicago pizza, I'm probably going directly to the source — especially when you have the best pizza in the country around you.
headsUp: The only reason to order Chicago deep dish in New York. Seriously.
update: Tavern-style has improved considerably. Worth trying alongside the deep dish.
address: Two locations in the West Village, New York
